content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(2, 3, 0), (1, 3, 4), (0, 4, 9), (1, 6, 15), (6, 8, 16), (2, 8, 17), (7, 9, 17), (3, 9, 25), (3, 7, 27), (3, 8, 28), (0, 8, 29), (5, 8, 29), (6, 9, 29)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 3 exactly at time 28.

First, we will scan each edge and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (2, 3, 0) has node 2 and time 0. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (1, 3, 4) has node 1 and time 4. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (0, 4, 9) has node 0 and time 9. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (1, 6, 15) has node 1 and time 15. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (6, 8, 16) has node 6 and time 16. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (2, 8, 17) has node 2 and time 17. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (7, 9, 17) has node 7 and time 17. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 9, 25) has node 3 and time 25. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 7, 27) has node 3 and time 27. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (3, 8, 28) has node 3 and time 28. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 8, 29) has node 0 and time 29. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (5, 8, 29) has node 5 and time 29. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (6, 9, 29) has node 6 and time 29. -> Add node 9.

Now we have collected all nodes that are linked with node 3 at time 28.

Answer: [8]
